_comment: Expected output for verify-external.sh. Update on first verified run; PENDING_FIRST_VERIFICATION values are placeholders.
_notes: BusyBox upstream is musl-static built; F5 should report `musl`, F1 should not apply glibc fortify suppression. Banned-function list reflects symbols typically present in BusyBox 1.36.1 multiarch-musl builds and must be re-confirmed on first run.
